Description: Operator of a digital therapeutics platform intended to treat CNS and rare genetic conditions. The company's platform creates a customizable interface, using advanced AI and machine learning to tailor therapies for each and every patient, based on their specific needs, enabling clinicians to understand, engage and treat their patients quickly and effectively.
Keywords: digital therapeutics, medical treatment, medication compliance, neurological healthcare service, parkinson therapy, parkinson's disease treatment, parkinson's treatment

Description: Developer of virtual reality therapeutic devices designed to address unmet needs and improve clinical outcomes for pain management. The company's devices are clinically validated, on-demand, and all-in-one platforms for acute and chronic pain, enabling doctors to improve clinical outcomes for patients with serious health conditions.
Keywords: chronic pain devices, cognitive behavioral platform, digital therapeutics, pain management system, virtual reality system, virtual reality therapeutics
FinancingStatusNote: The company received $6 million of debt financing in the form of a loan from F-Prime Capital on February 23, 2023. Previously, the company joined Techstars on August 9, 2022 and received $13,333 in funding.
